channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: 11 A/B Test Tools That Give Real Answers (Ranked and Tested)
item.description: 11 A/B test tools compared with real traffic data from Africa — pick the one that won’t break on 2G, respects your budget, and gives real answers, not noise.

item.title: Kubernetes: 13 times it helps and 6 times it hurts — ranked
item.description: Cut API response time by 40% and 99.99% uptime with Kubernetes — ranked list of 13 help/hurt scenarios, real latency numbers, and cost per 10k requests across Lagos, Berlin, Singapore, and San Francisco.

item.title: Ethical Hacker Mindset: How Pen Tests Actually Find Flaws
item.description: Cut brute-force bypass risk by 80% with atomic lockout state — real Django, Node.js and Redis fixes, pitfalls, and chaos tests that caught our mistakes in Nairobi fintech stacks.

item.title: Zero-to-Hired in 12 Months: Tech Career Roadmap finally explained
item.description: Land a $35k–$50k tech job in 12 months with zero prior experience — exact 4-layer roadmap, tools, and 30-second demo videos that got interviews. Includes Python, React, Node, PostgreSQL, and free tiers used by real hires in Lagos, Nairobi, Chicago and Berlin.

item.title: 13 ways developers can build real influence at work
item.description: Build real dev influence in 30 days with 13 ranked tactics — measured outcomes, code templates, and the one-page post-mortem that cut interrupt-driven work by 30% in Nairobi fintech teams.

item.title: Turn your personal data into $2,800/month without selling it
item.description: ll missed 40% of installs on iOS. I realize with Turn personal data into — run and still missed 40% of installs on iOS.

item.title: The 3 tech roles quietly dominating backend hiring in 2024
item.description: Cut p99 latency by 77% and 5xx errors by 95% by tuning the exact connection pool and lock knobs the fastest-growing tech roles use every day — Platform Reliability Engineer and Database Reliability Engineer roles are exploding because the docs won’t save you from cloud throttling, lock contention, and connection pool exhaustion.

item.title: React Server Components fail when hydration skips state — here's why
item.description: Cut hydration mismatch warnings by 94% in React Server Components — serialization patterns, environment traps, and CI checks that work in Next.js 13.4+ for apps in Lagos, London, Manila, and Montreal.

item.title: AI skills paying 50% more by 2026 — what we measured
item.description: Cut AI cloud bills by 74% and latency by 79% by 2026 — the exact skills, tools, and code that hiring managers now demand for AI roles. Includes Rust middleware, Prometheus metrics, and drift detection with numbers.

item.title: Your System Design Interview Answer Scores 2/5 — Here's How to Get 5/5
item.description: Cut interview scores from 2/5 to 5/5 by attaching cost and rollback stories to every choice — proven frameworks, real incident war stories, and a boring-stack cheat sheet with RTO/RPO numbers.

item.title: Why your retail product detection model fails on new shelves (and how to fix it)
item.description: Cut on-shelf availability false positives by 80% with store-level holdouts, lighting augmentation, and geometric augmentation — the retail product detection failures we measured and the fixes that worked in production.

item.title: How Nigerian Prince scams still work: a 2024 teardown of social engineering
item.description: Cut social engineering success rate from 12% to 0.8% with a 60-second pause, voice verification, and regional tweaks — no magic, just cognitive load engineering.

item.title: AWS bill halved — here’s how we did it
item.description: Cut AWS bill by 53% in six months with concrete steps, benchmarks, and automation — orphaned data, Savings Plans, Spot, and real dashboards included. Optimize your AWS bill today.

item.title: How async/await, destructuring & optional chaining cut bugs 42% in 6 weeks
item.description: Cut bug tickets 42% and FX-widget latency to 280ms using async/await, destructuring & optional chaining — plus the mistakes that nearly derailed the rollout

item.title: Debugging Mindset Finally Explained: Why 90% of Bugs Die in 3 Steps
item.description: Fixed a $1,200 silent failure in 20 minutes by asking 'what changed' instead of reading logs — here’s the exact debugging mindset that turns chaotic bugs into repeatable investigations with real code examples and failure scenarios.

item.title: You’re choosing the wrong mobile stack — here’s the proof
item.description: odule was 70% of the business logic, but th with You choosing mobile stack — build iOS and Android Studio to build Android.

item.title: Docker in production fails with 'container out of memory' — and how to fix it
item.description: Cut Docker OOM crashes by 95% in production with 256Mi memory limits, alpine images, and kernel upgrades — learn the exact fixes for 'container_linux.go:380: memory: unknown error after fork/exec' and how to prevent it from happening again.

item.title: Analytics lie when NULLs masquerade as zeros — here’s the proof
item.description: Reduce false alerts by 70% by stopping NULLs from turning into zeros in SQL and BI tools — see actual BigQuery, Spark, and Stripe failures we debugged and the fixes that worked.

item.title: Big Tech is a dead end for most engineers
item.description: Big Tech engineers quit for 'better culture' but end up debugging memory leaks in Rust for three customers. Here’s how 12 engineers I mentored chose wisely—and how to pick your next move with data, not hype.

item.title: Why ClickHouse pays 3× more than PostgreSQL in 2024
item.description: Discover how ClickHouse cut 250GB analytics latency from 842ms to 18ms and reduced cloud costs by 38% — the tech skill paying 3× more than PostgreSQL in 2024.
